channel.title: Frontion News - Tier 1 Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources: Reuters, AP, BBC, AFP, Al Jazeera, Guardian, NYT, WP, FT, Economist, Bloomberg, WSJ, CNN, CBS, NBC, CNBC, NPR

item.title: 🇪🇺🇺🇦 EU Approves $106 Billion Loan for Ukraine Military Support
item.description: The European Union approved a massive loan package heavily weighted toward military spending, signaling expectations of a prolonged conflict. Unlike previous aid packages, this one is designed to put Ukraine on solid footing for a long fight against Russia.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️ Iran Under Collective Military Leadership After Khamenei Death
item.description: Following the killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran has shifted to a collective leadership structure with the Revolutionary Guards wielding significantly more power. The new arrangement includes prominent generals and Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇬🇧 Trump Says King Charles Visit Could Repair US-UK Relations
item.description: In a BBC interview, President Trump said the upcoming visit by King Charles III could "absolutely" help repair strained relations between the United States and United Kingdom. The president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK Prime Minister.

item.title: 🇮🇷🎬 BBC Analysis: Iranian Forces Staged Video of Ship Seizures
item.description: Video analysis indicates that parts of a propaganda video showing masked Iranian forces seizing ships appear to have been filmed hours after the vessels were reportedly captured. The revelation raises questions about Iran's information operations during the conflict.

item.title: ⛪ Pope urges US and Iran to return to peace talks, condemns capital punishment
item.description: Pope Leo XIV called for de-escalation and a return to diplomatic negotiations between the US and Iran during his Africa tour, criticizing capital punishment while addressing the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump reclassifies medical marijuana as less-dangerous drug in historic shift
item.description: President Trump signed an order reclassifying state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug, marking a historic shift in US drug policy after decades of strict federal classification.

item.title: 💰 Meta slashes 8,000 jobs as AI spending soars
item.description: Meta announced its largest layoff since 2023, cutting 10% of its workforce as the company ramps up AI infrastructure investments, joining other tech giants in cost-cutting measures.

item.title: 🌍 More than 500 killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
item.description: An official inquiry found over 500 people were killed during Tanzania elections, with opposition parties accusing security forces, though the report does not specify who was responsible for the deaths.

item.title: 🇨🇳 White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
item.description: A White House memo from Michael Kratsios alleges that firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models, raising tensions over intellectual property and technology competition.

item.title: 🇬🇧🇮🇱 UK Police Arrest Two More Over Alleged Iran-Backed Arson Plot Targeting Jewish Site
item.description: Police did not name a specific location but said the intended target was connected to the Jewish community. The arrests are part of a counter-terrorism investigation.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli Police Detain Professor Over Kippa With Israeli and Palestinian Flags, Cut Off Palestine Flag
item.description: Alex Sinclair says two officers detained him at a cafe, accusing him of incitement. When he refused to leave without his kippa, an officer cut out the Palestinian flag.

item.title: 🏛️ Trump Administration Probes NYC Education Department Over Pro-Palestinian Group
item.description: The probe escalates federal pressure on local institutions over activities related to Israel-Gaza protests and speech.

item.title: 🎨 Venice Biennale Jury Excludes Russia and Israel From Artist Awards as EU Threatens Funding Cut
item.description: The decision marks a cultural front opening in geopolitical tensions, with European Union officials questioning continued funding.

item.title: 🌏 The Quad Is on the Brink of Extinction
item.description: The US-India-Japan-Australia security partnership faces existential questions as member states recalibrate their China strategies.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Orders Military to Shoot Iranian Boats Blocking Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Trump has authorized US forces to fire on Iranian small boats obstructing the strategic waterway, escalating tensions as the naval blockade continues.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israel and Lebanon Agree to Extend Ceasefire by Three Weeks
item.description: Trump announced the extension after ambassadors from both countries met in Washington. The fragile truce was due to expire Sunday.

item.title: 🛢️ US Boards Ship Carrying Iranian Oil as Blockade Intercepts 33 Vessels
item.description: US Central Command reports intercepting 33 vessels since imposing the blockade on ships traveling to and from Iran.

item.title: ⚓ Navy Secretary John Phelan Leaves Post Effective Immediately
item.description: The Pentagon announced Phelan's departure amid tensions over US shipbuilding, the latest in a series of top defense leadership exits.

item.title: 🇻🇪 US Soldier Charged After Betting $400,000 on Maduro's Removal Using Classified Info
item.description: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket based on classified information about the Venezuela operation.

item.title: 🇬🇧🇺🇦 Prince Harry visits Kyiv in show of support for Ukraine
item.description: The Duke of Sussex attended a security conference in the Ukrainian capital, demonstrating continued Western support as global attention remains focused on the Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US boards Iranian oil tanker in Indian Ocean as blockade expands
item.description: US forces intercepted the M/T Majestic X carrying Iranian oil, marking an escalation of the naval blockade. Trump also ordered the Navy to "shoot and kill" any boats laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇵🇭⚖️ Philippines ex-president Duterte to face ICC trial for crimes against humanity
item.description: International Criminal Court judges ruled there are substantial grounds to believe Duterte guided the anti-drugs crackdown that killed thousands, clearing the way for a landmark trial.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇨🇳 Taiwan president blames China for cancellation of Africa trip
item.description: President Lai Ching-te postponed his visit to Eswatini after China pressured African countries to deny overflight permissions, in the latest sign of escalating cross-strait tensions.

item.title: 🇦🇫🇺🇸 Trump officials consider sending 1,100 Afghan allies to Congo
item.description: Afghans who aided US forces during the 20-year war may be resettled in Congo instead of the United States, drawing criticism from veterans and advocacy groups.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇺🇦💰 EU Approves €106 Billion Ukraine Loan After Hungary Lifts Veto
item.description: The European Union formally approved a massive loan package to help Ukraine meet its economic and military needs for the next two years, overcoming Hungary's previous objections.
